description: A perfect addition to your ethnic wardrobe, this slipper from catwalk is crafted from durable material in fashionable cuts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style.Heel: 1.5"UpperHeavily embellished synthetic leather straps in a thong style with a toe separatorSynthetic leather lined footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with grooves for absolute gripSlipper careWipe surface with a clean and dry clothDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
